titleStmt.title: SII 41.165: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 165. (A.R. No. 383 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Sundara Varada-Perumāḷ temple at Kāvēripākkam,

summary.p: This inscription records a private agreement among certain merchants, that on marriage and other occasions, a certain amount of money should be set apart to meet the repairs of the Kēśava-Perumāḷ temple at Kāvēripākkam, alias Vikrama-chōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. The merchants are referred to as Vaisya-vāṇikar Dharma-tāvaḷa Abhaya-tavaḷa-nagarattār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . man mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harihararāya vipāṭa bhāṣaikkuttappuvarāyagaṇḍan mūvarāyar pūpūrva Okṣiṇa pakṣima Uttara catucamudrādhipati śrīvīrapratāpadevarāyar kumārar mallikārjuṉa rāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakāptam 137 10 7
ṉ mēl cellāṉiṉṟa yuva varuṣam Āṭi mātam 2§ candragirirājyattil kāverippākkamāṉa vikramacoḻacaturvvedimaṅkalattu nakarattār naṭutteruvil kecavapperumāḷ koyilukku Itteruvil vaisya vāṇikar dharmma tāvaḷa Abhaya tā
vaḷa nakarattār paṇṇik koṭutta dharmmaśāsaṉam Eṅkaḷ teruvil kalliyāṇappaṇam yāttiraippaṇam kaiviṭu motirappaṇam pūṭacapoṉ vakai pattukku mūṉṟupaṇam Inta vakaippaṭiyiluḷḷatu Eṅkaḷ teruvil kecavapperumāḷ kōyilukku tiruppaṇikkum
Upayattukkum naṭattak kaṭavatākavum Intakoyilil dharmmattu Ahitam niṉaittavaṉ kemgaik karaiyilk kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāpattilum brāhmaṇaṉaik koṉṟa pāpattilum pokakkaṭavarākavum nakarakkaṇakkaṉeḻuttu§
Digital edition of SII 41.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
